title: MCP test helper skips when datasets absent
evidence: main_test.go:16 t.Skipf("datasets not available: %v"); guarded by os.Stat of data/kaggle/Brasileirao_Matches.csv at main_test.go:15. Data IS present in this run and test_coverage=0.6527 (scores.json) confirms tests executed, so the skip does not fire here.
suggestion: Reasonable defensive guard for trimmed checkouts; keep, but ensure CI fails loudly if data is unexpectedly missing rather than silently skipping the MCP end-to-end tests.

title: Integration test helper skips when datasets absent
evidence: soccer/integration_test.go:16 t.Skipf("datasets not available at %s: %v"); guarded by os.Stat at integration_test.go:15. Does not fire in this run (data present, tests ran).
suggestion: Same as test-skip-1 — conditional guard, acceptable; consider a single env flag to require datasets in CI.

title: Last-resort date layout 01/02/2006 can misparse ambiguous dates
evidence: soccer/loader.go:25 dateLayouts includes "01/02/2006" // last resort after "02/01/2006"; for a date like 03/04/2019 the first matching (DD/MM) layout wins, but any source using MM/DD that also fits DD/MM would be silently misread.
suggestion: Document the assumed date convention per source file, or detect format from the source rather than relying on layout ordering.

title: Implements 12 MCP tools spanning all required query capabilities plus extras
evidence: tools.go registers search_matches, head_to_head, team_record, team_competitions, standings, competition_stats, biggest_wins, top_scoring_teams, search_players, player_info, club_players, dataset_overview. team_competitions and dataset_overview go beyond the spec.
suggestion: No action — surfaced as positive signal for cross-run comparison.
